data.title: Mosman Oil and Gas Advances EPA-155 Project with Strategic Agreement
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Mosman Oil and Gas ( (GB:MSMN) ) has issued an announcement.

Mosman Oil and Gas has entered into a formal share sale and purchase agreement concerning the EPA-155 project, receiving a AU$50,000 non-refundable deposit. This strategic move allows Mosman to secure royalties, reduce operating costs, and focus on lower-cost exploration opportunities in the U.S., where established helium infrastructure and growing markets exist.

More about Mosman Oil and Gas

Mosman Oil and Gas Limited is a company specializing in the exploration, development, and production of helium, hydrogen, and hydrocarbons, with projects based in the United States and Australia. The company focuses on identifying opportunities that provide operating cash flow and development potential, with ongoing exploration projects in Central Australia’s Amadeus Basin.

YTD Price Performance: 26.67%

Average Trading Volume: 356,771,644

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: £7.72M

data.title: HKT Limited Achieves Strong Growth in 2024 with Advances in Broadband and 5G
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Pacific Century Regional Developments ( (SG:P15) ) just unveiled an update.

HKT Limited reported its annual results for the year ended December 31, 2024, highlighting its consolidated market leadership in broadband with 1.04 million FTTH connections and an 800G AI Superhighway service launch. The company saw a 25% increase in its 5G customer base, contributing to a 5% growth in mobile services revenue, while its enterprise business scaled with over HK$5 billion in new projects. Total revenue grew by 1% to HK$34,753 million, with a 3% increase in EBITDA due to efficiency improvements through AI applications. The profit attributable to shareholders rose by 2% to HK$5,070 million, with a total distribution per Share Stapled Unit of 78.80 HK cents.

More about Pacific Century Regional Developments

HKT Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and managed by HKT Management Limited under HKT Trust, is a leading telecommunications company. It specializes in broadband services, including FTTH connections, and offers various mobile and enterprise services, with a focus on data centers, cloud, and AI service providers.

YTD Price Performance: 21.67%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $739.8M

Compagnie des Alpes ( (FR:CDA) ) has issued an update.

Compagnie des Alpes has announced the procedures for accessing documents related to its upcoming Annual General Meeting scheduled for March 13, 2025. The company emphasizes transparency and accessibility for its stakeholders, with all relevant materials available online, reflecting its commitment to stakeholder engagement and regulatory compliance within the leisure industry.

Compagnie des Alpes (CDA) is a prominent entity in the leisure industry, offering a wide range of services and experiences in Europe. data.title: The Property Franchise Group Announces Executive-Linked Share Sale
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The Property Franchise ( (GB:TPFG) ) just unveiled an update.

The Property Franchise Group PLC announced a transaction involving the sale of 8,788 ordinary shares by a person associated with Michelle Brook, an Executive Director, at a price of 438.5p per share. This transaction reduces Brook’s beneficial holding to 200,180 ordinary shares. The sale was conducted on 17th February 2025 at the London Stock Exchange’s AIM market, and the announcement reflects compliance with the UK Market Abuse Regulation.

More about The Property Franchise

The Property Franchise Group PLC (AIM: TPFG) is the UK’s largest multi-brand property franchisor, with a network of over 1,946 outlets delivering high-quality services to residential clients. The company has a diverse portfolio of 18 brands, including both high-street and hybrid brands, and is a member of leading mortgage networks through Brook Financial (MAB) and The Mortgage Genie (Primis). Headquartered in Bournemouth, it was listed on AIM on the London Stock Exchange in 2013 and entered the AIM 100 in July 2024.

Japan Real Estate Investment ( (JP:8952) ) just unveiled an update.

Japan Real Estate Investment Corporation announced a significant leadership change at Japan Real Estate Asset Management Co., Ltd., appointing Kazuyuki Inoue as the new Representative Director, President & CEO, effective April 1, 2025. This leadership transition marks a strategic move for the company, potentially impacting its strategic planning and market operations, as current CEO Shojiro Kojima is set to retire, and another director, Miwako Chiba, will resign.

More about Japan Real Estate Investment

Japan Real Estate Investment Corporation (JRE) operates in the real estate investment industry, focusing on asset management through Japan Real Estate Asset Management Co., Ltd. It is engaged in the investment of real estate assets, providing services primarily to shareholders and stakeholders in the real estate market.

SSE ( (GB:SSE) ) has shared an update.

SSE PLC has announced the application for the listing and admission of 2,696,801 ordinary shares on the Financial Conduct Authority and the London Stock Exchange. These shares, issued under the Company’s Scrip Dividend Scheme for the interim dividend ending March 31, 2025, will align with existing shares and are expected to be admitted on February 27, 2025.

SSE PLC is a company operating within the energy industry, primarily focused on providing electricity and gas services. It is known for its commitment to sustainable energy solutions and operates predominantly in the UK and Ireland markets.

Da Yu Financial Holdings Limited ( (HK:1073) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Da Yu Financial Holdings Limited has issued a positive profit alert, indicating a significant financial turnaround with an expected net profit of approximately HK$21 million for the year ending December 2024, compared to a net loss of about HK$162 million in the previous year.
